_comment: Variant of config.example.json that pipes threshold crossings into the Triage meta-scheduler (https://github.com/CryptoJones/Triage). The triage CLI must be on PATH. See https://github.com/CryptoJones/Triage/blob/main/docs/runpodboss-integration.md for the full rationale.

thresholds.name: warning
critical
emergency
